completed_tasks.name: Align Ghosthand route surface to the settled local-agent contract
Root-install updated APK and verify major read/action routes on-device
Debug remaining sensing and wait blockers
completed_tasks.progress: Added crash-safe screenshot handling, root screenshot fallback, command catalog, notification buffer, and concurrent request handling. /screenshot still unavailable without completed permission/fallback path. /wait transport is fixed but semantic change detection still needs a final passing live verification.

blockers.workaround: Root screencap works directly under su -c, but the in-process fallback is not yet taking effect. MediaProjection consent click no longer crashes the app, but the permission path has not been completed successfully.

blockers.description: GET /wait still has no confirmed passing live foreground-change verification
blockers.workaround: Transport bottleneck is fixed by concurrent request handling. Need a final Settings -> Home or similar verified transition after the latest build.

blockers.description: Repeated APK reinstalls can leave Ghosthand accessibility enabled but not rebound until secure settings are rewritten
blockers.workaround: Use separate root commands: start foreground service, temporarily set enabled_accessibility_services to Orb only, then restore Orb + Ghosthand core.

human_actions_pending.action: Complete screenshot consent if the system dialog is shown
human_actions_pending.context: MediaProjection path is still needed as the clean non-root screenshot route when the platform allows it.

decisions.decision: Adapt the external MVP's method rather than its code: fresh current-window reads, action-ready responses, and explicit stale-reference handling
decisions.rationale: Makes Ghosthand workable for on-device agents without copying external implementation or naming.
Agents running on-device need discoverable route, method, and parameter metadata instead of relying only on repo docs.

decisions.decision: Make the local API server handle clients concurrently
decisions.rationale: Blocking GET /wait requests were starving all other requests when the server handled one client at a time.

decisions.decision: Keep screenshot failure crash-safe and fall through to secondary capture paths
decisions.rationale: On this device, AccessibilityService.takeScreenshot throws SecurityException, so Ghosthand must fail safely and continue running.

next_action: Resume by restoring the runtime with root (start foreground service, rebind accessibility service), then finish GET /screenshot first: either complete MediaProjection consent successfully or make the in-process root fallback actually return data. After that, rerun GET /wait across a real Settings -> Home foreground transition, then verify focused/input/setText/scroll/swipe/longpress/gesture in order.
context_notes: Major route surface is now much closer to the target local-agent contract. Verified on-device: ping, screen, tree, info, find, tap, click, back, home, recents, clipboard read/write, notify post/read, commands catalog. The current pause point is no longer broad API shape work; it is final runtime acceptance of screenshot, wait, and the remaining text/gesture endpoints.
